comment.body:
i remember, there was a guy who danced wonderfully,
we were in the theater, preparing for the performance.
and the guy (he was 2 class above me), had problems with the jumps.
it had a strong sound when he landed, and it was like disillusioning.

there was an old man, old-balett artist, conducted us (he wasn't a teacher, he was the friend of our teacher and director)
and after our teacher tried every trick to correct the technical mistake this guy kept making, unsuccessfully the old man came and said to this guy:
"you know, you are too heavy, bcs when you jump you imagine it like 'down', 'down'... no, young man. Think about it as 'up', 'up'"
comment.raw_body:
